description: Add editable recurrence UI (clickable badge with popover), inline intervention/reminder toggle on each row, reclassify property templates as reminders with recurrence, propagate itemType/recurrenceRule across all wizards, split server-side dispatch by itemType.

userStories.title: RRULE helper utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared RRULE build/parse utility so that all components use consistent recurrence logic without duplicating code.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/utils/rrule.ts exports buildRRule, parseRRule, RECURRENCE_PRESETS, getRecurrenceLabel
buildRRule('MONTHLY', 3) returns 'FREQ=MONTHLY;INTERVAL=3'
parseRRule('FREQ=YEARLY;INTERVAL=10') returns { frequency: 'YEARLY', interval: 10 }
RECURRENCE_PRESETS has 4 entries: Mensuel, Trimestriel, Semestriel, Annuel
getRecurrenceLabel replaces inline logic in intervention-schedule-row.tsx
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Created lib/utils/rrule.ts with buildRRule, parseRRule, RECURRENCE_PRESETS, getRecurrenceLabel. Updated intervention-schedule-row.tsx to use getRecurrenceLabel.

userStories.title: Templates reclassification (all 3 constant files)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all templates to have explicit itemType and recurrenceRule so that the UI can render and edit them correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: lease-interventions.ts: all 6 templates have explicit itemType, 4 reminders have recurrenceRule

property-interventions.ts: 9 templates have itemType:'reminder', recurrenceRule on 5 periodic ones (chaudiere, ascenseur, incendie, PEB, nettoyage/espaces verts), PropertyInterventionTemplate interface has recurrenceRule field
supplier-interventions.ts: createSupplierReminderIntervention returns recurrenceRule:'FREQ=YEARLY;INTERVAL=1'
Missing doc templates return itemType:'reminder' (already done, verify)
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: All 9 property templates reclassified as reminder with recurrenceRule. Supplier factory gets YEARLY recurrence. Lease already correct. PropertyInterventionTemplate interface extended with recurrenceRule.

userStories.title: InterventionScheduleRow — toggle type + recurrence popover
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to toggle between intervention and reminder on each row, and edit the recurrence via a clickable badge, so I can customize each scheduled item.
acceptanceCriteria: Segmented control (Wrench/Bell icons) visible when row is enabled, between icon and title
Clicking toggle changes itemType, border color (indigo/amber), and assignment roles
Switching intervention→reminder removes non-gestionnaire assignees
Recurrence badge is a PopoverTrigger with 4 presets + custom (number + mois/ans)
Option 'Pas de recurrence' removes recurrenceRule, badge disappears
When no recurrence, '+ Recurrence' ghost button shown instead
New props: onItemTypeChange, onRecurrenceChange
Uses getRecurrenceLabel from lib/utils/rrule.ts instead of inline logic
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Full rewrite of InterventionScheduleRow: added segmented toggle (Wrench/Bell), recurrence popover with presets+custom, extracted RecurrencePopoverContent component. New props: onItemTypeChange, onRecurrenceChange.

userStories.title: InterventionPlannerStep — pass new handlers, remove sectionType
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the shared planner to propagate onItemTypeChange and onRecurrenceChange to each row so that toggle and recurrence edits work in contract wizards.
acceptanceCriteria: InterventionPlannerStep passes onItemTypeChange and onRecurrenceChange to each InterventionScheduleRow
Handler updates scheduledInterventions state via onInterventionsChange
sectionType styling removed from section headers (color comes from individual row itemType)
Lease and supplier wizards render correctly with mixed intervention/reminder rows
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Added handleItemTypeChange (strips non-gestionnaire on reminder switch) and handleRecurrenceChange. Passed to each row. Removed sectionType header styling — neutral colors for custom-add sections.

userStories.title: Lease & supplier section grouping cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want lease and supplier sections to not split strictly by itemType so that rows with toggles display in a unified list.
acceptanceCriteria: lease-interventions-step.tsx: single main section with all intervention+reminder rows (no separate 'Admin reminders' section), rent reminders section kept, missing docs section kept
contract-form-container.tsx: supplier sections unified (single list, not split by itemType)
Collapsible behavior removed from sections (toggle on each row replaces section-level distinction)
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Lease: merged interventions+reminders into single 'Suivis du bail' section with allowCustomAdd. Supplier: unified into single 'Suivis du contrat' section. Removed sectionType from both. Cleaned unused Calendar/Bell imports.

userStories.title: PropertyInterventionsStep — full propagation + dispatch split
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the property wizard to propagate itemType/recurrenceRule from templates, handle toggle/recurrence changes, and split dispatch by itemType at submit time.
acceptanceCriteria: useEffect maps recurrenceRule from template to ScheduledInterventionData
onItemTypeChange and onRecurrenceChange handlers update state
Add popover for custom suivi: Intervention / Rappel choice
Submit splits by itemType: reminders → createWizardRemindersAction, interventions → createInterventionAction
Non-gestionnaire assignees filtered from reminder items at submit
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: PropertyInterventionsStep: useEffect propagates itemType+recurrenceRule from templates, handleItemTypeChange/handleRecurrenceChange handlers, custom add popover (Intervention/Rappel). Building form: dual dispatch (building-level+per-lot). Lot form: createInterventionsForLot split + composite path buildCompositeInterventions filters intervention-only + fireAndForgetReminders for reminder items.

userStories.title: Contract submit — propagate edited recurrenceRule
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the lease and supplier submit to use the user-modified recurrenceRule (not just template default) so that custom recurrence is persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Lease submit maps r.recurrenceRule (potentially edited) in createWizardRemindersAction call
If user toggled a template reminder→intervention, it goes to createInterventionAction
If user toggled a template intervention→reminder, it goes to createWizardRemindersAction
Non-gestionnaire assignees cleaned from reminder items before submit
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Lease: already passes r.recurrenceRule, added gestionnaire-only filter on reminder assignees. Supplier: added rrule to SupplierContractReminderConfig + Zod schema, updated createReminderInterventions to use createWizardRemindersAction for RRULE support, filter reminders map to exclude toggled-to-intervention items, handle toggled items alongside custom interventions. Property composite: buildCompositeInterventions filters intervention-only, fireAndForgetReminders handles reminder items.
